_comment_1: PACKAGE.JSON - The manifest file for a Node.js project
_comment_2: This file tells npm (Node Package Manager) everything about your project:
_comment_6: When you run 'npm install', npm reads this file and downloads all dependencies
name: sciencebowl-online-backend
description: Science Bowl Online - Real-time competitive science quiz platform
_comment_main: main: Entry point when this package is imported as a module
_comment_scripts_1: SCRIPTS - Commands you can run with 'npm run <script-name>'
_comment_scripts_2: These are shortcuts for common development and deployment tasks

scripts._comment_start: start: Production command - runs the server directly with Node
scripts._comment_dev: dev: Development command - uses nodemon which auto-restarts when you save files
scripts._comment_test: test: Runs automated tests with Jest testing framework
scripts._comment_seed: seed: Populates the database with initial question data

_comment_deps_1: DEPENDENCIES - Packages required to run the application
_comment_deps_2: These get installed in the node_modules folder
_comment_deps_3: The ^ symbol means 'compatible with this version' (allows minor updates)
_comment_bcrypt: bcryptjs: Hashes passwords securely (never store plain text passwords!)
_comment_cors: cors: Allows your frontend (localhost:3000) to talk to backend (localhost:5000)
_comment_dotenv: dotenv: Loads environment variables from .env file (for secrets/config)
_comment_express: express: The web framework - handles HTTP requests and routing
_comment_ratelimit: express-rate-limit: Prevents abuse by limiting requests per IP
_comment_validator: express-validator: Validates and sanitizes user input
_comment_helmet: helmet: Adds security headers to protect against common attacks
_comment_jwt: jsonwebtoken: Creates tokens for user authentication (like a digital ID card)
_comment_mongoose: mongoose: Object Data Modeling (ODM) for MongoDB - makes database operations easier
_comment_morgan: morgan: Logs HTTP requests to console (helpful for debugging)
_comment_nodemailer: nodemailer: Sends transactional emails (password reset links)
_comment_socketio: socket.io: Enables real-time bidirectional communication (for live games)
_comment_devdeps_1: DEV DEPENDENCIES - Only needed during development, not in production
_comment_nodemon: nodemon: Watches files and restarts server automatically when you save
_comment_jest: jest: Automated testing framework for Node.js
_comment_supertest: supertest: HTTP assertions for testing HTTP servers
_comment_engines: engines: Specifies which Node.js version is required
